articles.title: Wholesale inflation hits a 42-month high — but does it really spell bad news for your wallet?
articles.excerpt: India's wholesale inflation hit 8.3% in April, a 42-month high, mainly due to rising energy prices from the West Asia conflict. Experts note a weak correlation with consumer prices, suggesting retail inflation may not rise significantly despite the wholesale …
